overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a beige suit running through a historic urban district resembling New Orleans French Quarter. The overcast, rainy weather and wet cobblestone streets create a moody atmosphere as the character navigates past vintage 1950s cars, wrought iron balconies, and palm-lined boulevards.

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a sidewalk beside a historic stone building with arched doorways. The wet cobblestone street runs parallel on the right, where a brown vintage car passes by. Large stone planters with palm trees line the sidewalk.

Palm trees line the grassy median as the character crosses the street. A red and white vintage sedan drives by, and yellow taxis are visible parked along the brick commercial buildings.

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a narrow cobblestone street lined with historic row houses featuring wrought iron balconies. A yellow pickup truck drives ahead while a blue vintage convertible is parked on the right. The character passes a woman in a white dress walking on the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic district, transitioning from a sheltered sidewalk into a wide urban intersection before narrowing into a residential street. It begins with the character running past stone buildings and palm trees as a brown vintage car glides along the wet cobblestones. As the character moves under a series of covered awnings and ornate wrought iron balconies, the perspective shifts toward an intersection where a red vintage car passes by. The scene then opens into a broad crossing with embedded tram tracks and a grassy median, passing parked yellow taxis and a red and white sedan. Finally, the camera turns away from the open road and follows the character down a narrow cobblestone lane lined with row houses, passing a blue convertible and a woman in a white dress.
